FR-01.title: Customer Registration and Login
requirements: Register with phone number and OTP verification
Login via phone OTP or email/password
Social login with Google
Profile with name, email, and saved addresses
acceptance_criteria: OTP is received within 30 seconds
Login grants access to app features
Social login creates account automatically
Profile data is saved correctly

FR-02.title: Restaurant Browsing
requirements: Display nearby restaurants based on user location
Filter by cuisine, rating, delivery time, and price range
Sort by distance, rating, or popularity
Show restaurant details: menu, rating, delivery time, minimum order
acceptance_criteria: Nearby restaurants load based on GPS location
Filters narrow down restaurant list correctly
Sort order updates immediately
Restaurant details are accurate and complete

FR-03.title: Menu and Item Selection
requirements: Display restaurant menu with categories
Each item shows name, description, price, and image
Items can have customization options (size, toppings)
Add items to cart with quantity selection
acceptance_criteria: Menu loads with correct categories and items
Item details display accurately
Customizations are reflected in price
Cart updates with selected items and quantities

FR-04.title: Shopping Cart and Checkout
requirements: Cart shows selected items with quantities and prices
Users can modify quantities or remove items
Apply promo codes for discounts
Select delivery address and payment method
acceptance_criteria: Cart displays accurate items and total
Quantity changes update total immediately
Valid promo code deducts discount
Order can be placed with address and payment

FR-05.title: Real-time Order Tracking
requirements: Live map showing delivery driver location
Order status updates: confirmed, preparing, picked up, delivered
Estimated delivery time with real-time updates
Push notifications for status changes
acceptance_criteria: Map shows driver position updating live
Status changes reflect immediately in UI
ETA adjusts based on driver location
Notifications arrive for each status change

FR-06.title: Payment Processing
requirements: Support credit/debit card payments
Cash on delivery option
Digital wallet integration
Payment receipt generated for each order
acceptance_criteria: Card payment processes successfully
COD orders are created without payment
Wallet balance deducts correctly
Receipt is available in order history

FR-07.title: Rating and Review
requirements: Rate restaurant with 1-5 stars after delivery
Rate delivery driver separately
Write optional text review
View restaurant ratings before ordering
acceptance_criteria: Rating is submitted after delivery
Driver rating is separate from restaurant
Review is displayed on restaurant page
Average rating updates correctly

FR-08.title: Restaurant Owner Dashboard
requirements: Restaurant owners can manage menu items
View and accept/reject incoming orders
Update restaurant hours and availability
View sales analytics and revenue reports
acceptance_criteria: Menu changes reflect in customer app
Orders can be accepted or rejected with reason
Availability status prevents new orders when closed
Analytics show accurate revenue and order data

FR-09.title: Delivery Driver App
requirements: Driver receives order assignment notifications
Navigation to restaurant and customer address
Driver can mark order as picked up and delivered
Earnings tracking and daily summary
acceptance_criteria: Driver receives push notification for new orders
Navigation opens with correct addresses
Status updates reflect in customer tracking
Earnings display accurately with breakdown

FR-10.title: Order History
requirements: View past orders with details and status
Reorder from previous orders with one tap
Download invoice for each order
Filter orders by date range
acceptance_criteria: Order history shows all past orders
Reorder adds same items to cart
Invoice downloads as PDF
Date filter returns correct orders

FR-11.title: Favorites and Saved Restaurants
requirements: Users can save favorite restaurants
Quick access to frequently ordered items
Favorites list accessible from profile
Suggested restaurants based on order history
acceptance_criteria: Restaurant is saved to favorites
Frequent items appear in quick order section
Favorites list loads correctly
Suggestions are relevant to user preferences

FR-12.title: Customer Support Chat
requirements: In-app chat for order issues
Chat with customer support agent
Attach images of incorrect orders
Chat history saved for reference
acceptance_criteria: Chat opens for active order issues
Messages are delivered in real-time
Image attachments upload correctly
Chat history persists across sessions

FR-01.title: Build OTP Authentication API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/send-otp (phone number), POST /api/auth/verify-otp (phone, code). Generate 6-digit OTP with 5-minute expiry. Send via SMS gateway. Create/login user on verification. Return JWT.

FR-01.title: Build Auth Screens
FR-01.description: Create phone number input screen with country code selector. OTP input screen with 6 digit fields and auto-submit. Profile setup screen for new users. Social login buttons.

FR-02.title: Build Restaurant Listing API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/restaurants with lat/lng params. Calculate distance, filter by cuisine/rating/delivery_time/price, sort by distance/rating/popularity. Return paginated results with restaurant details.

FR-02.title: Build Restaurant Browse Screen
FR-02.description: Create restaurant list with cards showing name, image, cuisine tags, rating stars, delivery time, and minimum order. Filter drawer and sort dropdown. Location permission request on first load.

FR-02.title: Implement Geolocation Service
FR-02.description: Create location service using device GPS. Calculate distances using Haversine formula. Cache user location. Geo-index restaurants for efficient proximity queries.

FR-03.title: Build Menu API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/restaurants/:id/menu returning categories with items. Each item has name, description, price, image_url, customizations (array of option groups). Support item availability toggle.

FR-03.title: Build Menu Screen
FR-03.description: Create menu screen with category tabs, item list with images, and item detail modal with customization options (radio/checkbox groups). Add to cart button with quantity selector. Sticky cart summary at bottom.

FR-04.title: Build Cart and Checkout API
FR-04.description: Create cart endpoints: POST /api/cart/items, PATCH /api/cart/items/:id, DELETE /api/cart/items/:id. POST /api/orders (create order from cart). POST /api/promo/validate for promo codes.

FR-04.title: Build Cart and Checkout Screens
FR-04.description: Create cart screen with item list, quantities, promo code input, order summary. Checkout flow: select address (map picker), select payment method, review and place order.

FR-05.title: Build Order Tracking API
FR-05.description: Create WebSocket endpoint for live tracking. Broadcast driver location updates. Update order status through lifecycle. Send push notifications on status changes. Calculate and update ETA.

FR-05.title: Build Tracking Screen
FR-05.description: Create order tracking screen with live map (driver marker, route line), order status timeline with timestamps, ETA display, and driver info card with call button.

FR-06.title: Build Payment Processing API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/payments/process. Support card payments (Stripe/gateway integration), COD flag, wallet deduction. Generate payment receipt. Handle payment failures with retry.

FR-06.title: Build Payment Selection UI
FR-06.description: Create payment method screen with saved cards, add new card form, COD option, and wallet balance display. Payment processing indicator with success/failure feedback.

FR-07.title: Build Rating API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/orders/:id/rate with restaurant_rating, driver_rating, review_text. Verify order is delivered. Update average ratings. One review per order.

FR-07.title: Build Rating Screen
FR-07.description: Create post-delivery rating prompt with star selectors for restaurant and driver separately. Optional text review. Submit button. Show after delivery confirmation.

FR-08.title: Build Restaurant Owner API
FR-08.description: Create owner endpoints: CRUD for menu items, GET /api/owner/orders (incoming), PATCH /api/owner/orders/:id (accept/reject), PATCH /api/owner/restaurant (hours/availability), GET /api/owner/analytics.

FR-08.title: Build Restaurant Owner Dashboard
FR-08.description: Create owner web dashboard with incoming orders panel (accept/reject buttons), menu manager, operating hours editor, and analytics charts (daily orders, revenue, popular items).

FR-09.title: Build Driver App API
FR-09.description: Create driver endpoints: GET /api/driver/orders (assigned), PATCH /api/driver/orders/:id/status (picked_up/delivered), POST /api/driver/location (update position), GET /api/driver/earnings.

FR-09.title: Build Driver App Screens
FR-09.description: Create driver app with order queue, navigation integration (Google Maps), order detail with pickup/delivery addresses, status update buttons (Picked Up, Delivered), and daily earnings summary.

FR-10.title: Build Order History API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/orders with pagination and date filters. GET /api/orders/:id for detail. POST /api/orders/:id/reorder to clone items to cart. GET /api/orders/:id/invoice for PDF.

FR-10.title: Build Order History Screen
FR-10.description: Create order history list with order date, restaurant name, total, status. Detail view with items. Reorder button. Invoice download. Date range filter.

FR-11.title: Build Favorites API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/favorites/:restaurantId (toggle), GET /api/favorites (list). GET /api/suggestions based on order history and preferences. Track frequently ordered items.

FR-11.title: Build Favorites Screen
FR-11.description: Create favorites page with saved restaurants grid. Quick reorder section with frequently ordered items. Suggestion carousel based on past orders.

FR-12.title: Build Support Chat API
FR-12.description: Create WebSocket chat for customer support. POST /api/support/tickets (create ticket for order). Support image attachments. Store chat history. Route to available agents.

FR-12.title: Build Support Chat Screen
FR-12.description: Create in-app chat with message bubbles, text input, image attachment button, and order reference. Show agent name and status. Chat history persists across sessions.
